title: Garlic Crisp Fry
description: A delicious Spanish-inspired fry recipe with a rich flavor.
instructions: Cut the potatoes into long, thin strips. Rinse in cold water to remove excess starch.
Dry the potatoes thoroughly with paper towels.
In a bowl, toss the potatoes with 2 tbsp olive oil, smoked paprika, and salt.
Line a baking sheet with parchment paper. Arrange the potatoes in a single layer.
Bake for 20-25 minutes or until crispy and golden.
While the potatoes are baking, heat the remaining 2 tbsp olive oil in a non-stick skillet over medium heat.
Add the minced garlic and sauté for 1-2 minutes or until fragrant.
Once the potatoes are done, toss them in the garlic-infused oil.
If desired, sprinkle with crisp crumb as a topping.
